description_long: This object is a military-style medal featuring a black iron cross with a metallic border, suspended from a ribbon. The ribbon is vertically striped in red, white, and black, and is attached to the cross by a small metal ring. The cross itself has a slightly weathered, antique finish, with subtle metallic highlights along the edges and a darkened central area. The ribbon appears to be made of fabric, showing some creases and a slight discoloration, suggesting age or use. The overall design is geometric and symmetrical, with the cross forming the central motif. The medal is compact and solid, with no visible gemstones or intricate engravings.
description: A military-style iron cross medal with a striped red, white, and black ribbon and a metallic border. The design is geometric and vintage, with a weathered finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full iron cross and the vertically striped ribbon in red, white, and black.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of both the cross and the folded ribbon.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, displaying the cross and ribbon from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thinness of the medal and ribbon.
